title: Premiere Limited
content:

|title=''Premiere Limited''
|game=[[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]]<ref name="Decipher">{{Decipher|url=starwars/whatisit/timeline.html|text=''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game Product Timeline}}</ref>

The '''''Premiere Limited''''' set was the base set of the [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]]. It consists of 324 cards (162 Dark Side and 162 Light Side cards) and was introduced in 1995. This set consists of 108 rare, 108 uncommon, and 108 common cards. The Premiere Limited set is different from the [[Premiere Unlimited]] only in that it has black borders while the unlimited has white borders. This set introduced many of the classic characters from [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']]. This set, however, did not include some characters and places that were significant in Episode IV like [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], and the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]].

==Release==
This set was sold in 15-card expansion packs and 36-pack expansion boxes. Also, starter decks were available in 60-card decks and 12-deck displays. Each pack included one rare card, four uncommon cards, and ten common cards. The set went out of print in April of 1996 when the almost identical Premiere Unlimited expansion set came out. A Japanese-text set was released for this expansion set in Japan.

==Continuity==
This set was the original source for the names of many characters from Episode IV. These included a large number of [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|cantina]] patrons including [[BoShek/Legends|BoShek]], [[Nabrun Leids/Legends|Nabrun Leids]], [[Trinto Duaba/Legends|Trinto Duaba]], [[Djas Puhr/Legends|Djas Puhr]] and many more. The set also included names for Rebel pilots [[Garven Dreis/Legends|Garven Dreis]] and [[Davish Krail]], [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] characters [[Nahdonnis Praji|Praji]] and [[Wullf Yularen/Legends|Wullf Yularen]], and many individual [[Droid/Legends|droids]].
